title: View team metrics and use TV-optimized mode
description: A public viewer can open a team dashboard, see team progress metrics and goal completion, and switch to a TV-optimized view that still shows accurate metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to open a public team dashboard
Wait for the team dashboard to finish loading
Switch to TV-optimized mode
Verify high-level team progress metrics and goal completion percentage are displayed
Verify the TV-optimized dashboard view is displayed in a simplified large-format layout

title: Public team dashboard displays core team metrics and goal completion
description: A public viewer can open a team’s dashboard and see team progress metrics and goal completion information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Public Dashboard Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+publicdash@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Click the link to view the public team dashboard
Verify team metrics and goal completion information are displayed
Verify a roster list is displayed on the public dashboard

title: Access control redirects unauthenticated users away from admin console
description: A user who is not signed in is redirected to the admin login when attempting to open the admin console.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Admin Access Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+access@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Navigate to /
Navigate to /[subdomain]/admin
Verify the user is redirected to the admin login page instead of seeing the admin console
Verify the admin console content is not displayed while unauthenticated

title: Public viewer can switch to TV-optimized mode
description: A public viewer can switch the public dashboard into TV-optimized mode and the view remains accurate and readable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals TV Mode Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+tv@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Click the link to view the public team dashboard
Switch the dashboard to TV-optimized mode
Verify the dashboard displays a simplified large-format TV view
Verify team metrics and goal completion are still displayed in TV mode

title: Create a new tenant dashboard via onboarding
description: A user completes onboarding to create a new team and then can access the resulting public dashboard for that subdomain.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals QA Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+qa-team@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Verify a confirmation state is displayed indicating the team dashboard was created
Click the link to view the new public team dashboard
Verify the public team dashboard loads and displays team metrics and goal completion

title: Admin adds an agent, saves, publishes, and sees agent on public dashboard
description: An admin can add an agent in the roster, save and publish changes, and the agent appears on the public dashboard roster.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Roster Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+roster@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Navigate to /[subdomain]/admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with admin+roster@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Submit the login form
Open roster management in the admin console
Add a new agent
Fill Agent One into the agent name field
Fill agent.one@example.com into the agent email field if present
Set valid agent goals and target volume values
Save roster changes
Publish updates to the live dashboard
Click the link to view the public team dashboard
Verify the public dashboard roster list includes Agent One
Verify the team metrics/goal completion section is displayed on the public dashboard

title: Public dashboard agent selection navigates to an agent performance profile
description: A public viewer can select an agent from the dashboard and reach that agent’s performance profile view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Agent Profile Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+agentprofile@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Navigate to /[subdomain]/admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with admin+agentprofile@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Submit the login form
Open roster management in the admin console
Add a new agent
Fill Agent Profile Target into the agent name field
Set valid agent goals and target volume values
Save roster changes
Publish updates to the live dashboard
Click the link to view the public team dashboard
Select Agent Profile Target from the roster list
Verify an agent performance profile page is displayed with key metrics
Verify production trend chart data and a transaction history section are displayed

title: Admin edits an existing agent goal and sees roster summary update
description: An admin can edit an existing agent’s goal values, save, and see the roster summary reflect the updated values.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Edit Agent Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+edit@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Navigate to /[subdomain]/admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with admin+edit@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Submit the login form
Open roster management in the admin console
Add a new agent
Fill Agent Two into the agent name field
Set valid agent goals and target volume values
Save roster changes
Select the existing agent Agent Two from the roster list
Update one of the agent goal values to a different valid number
Save roster changes
Verify the roster summary reflects the updated goal totals or progress
Verify the agent remains present in the roster list

title: Agent profile transaction list can be filtered by status
description: A public viewer can filter an agent’s transaction history by status and the list updates to match the selected status.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Status Filter Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+filter@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Navigate to /[subdomain]/admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with admin+filter@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Submit the login form
Open roster management in the admin console
Add a new agent
Fill Agent Filter Target into the agent name field
Set valid agent goals and target volume values
Save roster changes
Publish updates to the live dashboard
Click the link to view the public team dashboard
Select Agent Filter Target from the roster list
Select the Closed status filter for transactions
Verify the transaction history list updates to show only transactions matching the selected status
Select the Pending status filter for transactions
Verify the transaction history list updates to match the newly selected status

title: Ensure public dashboard does not show admin-only controls
description: A public viewer should not see any admin management controls while viewing a team dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to open a public team dashboard
Wait for the team dashboard to finish loading
Verify no admin-only management controls are visible on the public dashboard
Verify only read-only dashboard metrics and roster information are displayed

title: TV-optimized mode remains stable during extended viewing
description: A public viewer can leave the dashboard in TV-optimized mode and the view remains stable without losing core metrics display.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to open a public team dashboard
Wait for the team dashboard to finish loading
Switch to TV-optimized mode
Wait for a short period to simulate ongoing TV display
Verify high-level team progress metrics and goal completion percentage are still displayed
Verify the TV-optimized view remains visible and does not revert unexpectedly

title: Request password reset shows confirmation
description: An administrator can submit a password reset request and sees confirmation that a temporary password email was sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to open a team admin login page
Click the link to open password recovery
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the administrator email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify a confirmation state is shown indicating a temporary password email was sent

title: Roster form validates invalid goal inputs for an agent
description: An admin is prevented from saving when an agent has invalid goal inputs and sees validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals Validate Roster Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+validate@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill valid annual production goals into the goals fields
Submit onboarding
Navigate to /[subdomain]/admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with admin+validate@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Submit the login form
Open roster management in the admin console
Add a new agent
Fill Agent Invalid Goals into the agent name field
Fill a non-numeric value into a numeric goal field for the agent
Attempt to save roster changes
Verify a goal validation error is visible and changes are not saved
Verify the publish action is unavailable or ineffective until validation is resolved

title: Onboarding rejects non-numeric or negative goals
description: A user entering invalid goal values during onboarding sees validation and cannot submit until goals are valid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals QA Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+qa-team@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Fill a negative number into an annual goals numeric field
Attempt to submit onboarding
Verify a goals validation error is visible and onboarding cannot be submitted with invalid goal values

title: Onboarding blocks submission when required fields are missing
description: A user cannot submit onboarding with missing required information and sees validation errors prompting completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Leave the company name field empty
Attempt to continue to the next step
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for the missing company name
Attempt to submit onboarding from the final step without completing all required fields
Verify the onboarding cannot be submitted and validation errors are visible for the missing required fields

title: Password reset requires an email address
description: An administrator cannot submit a password reset request without providing an email and is shown a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to open a team admin login page
Click the link to open password recovery
Submit the password reset request
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the password reset request is not submitted

title: Onboarding rejects weak admin password
description: A user entering a weak admin password during onboarding is blocked from continuing until the password meets requirements.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals QA Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with admin+qa-team@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with 123
Attempt to continue or submit onboarding
Verify a password validation error is visible and onboarding cannot proceed with a weak password

title: Onboarding rejects invalid admin email format
description: A user entering an invalid admin email during onboarding is prevented from proceeding until a valid email is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start new team onboarding
Fill a new team subdomain value into the subdomain field
Fill TeamGoals QA Team into the company name field
Select a dashboard theme
Configure brand colors with valid values
Provide a valid external logo URL or choose a placeholder logo option
Fill in the admin email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the admin password field with a strong password
Attempt to continue or submit onboarding
Verify an email validation error is visible and onboarding cannot proceed with the invalid email

title: Password reset validates email format
description: An administrator entering an invalid email format on password recovery is shown an email validation error and cannot proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to open a team admin login page
Click the link to open password recovery
Fill an invalid email format into the administrator email field
Submit the password reset request
Verify an email format validation error is visible
Verify the password reset request is not submitted
